- task_type: chore
- title: Add clamp utility function
- description: Add a clamp utility function that constrains a number between a minimum and maximum value. The implementation should use Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max) pattern. Tests should cover: value within range, value below min, value above max, equal min/max, negative ranges, and decimal values.
- scope: [2 items] src/utils/clamp.ts, src/utils/clamp.test.ts
- risk_level: low
- hasUI: false
- questions: [0 items]
